description_long: This kiosk is a small, ornate stone structure with a square base set on a cobblestone platform. The walls are constructed from light-colored masonry blocks, with decorative cornerstones and a prominent crest featuring a crown and colored shield on the front. The roof is a dark, domed design with four finials at each corner and a central lantern-like ornament at the peak. There are plaques and signage on some sides, but no visible windows or doors, suggesting it may serve a commemorative or informational purpose. The structure is solid and robust, with a historical or ceremonial appearance. Its overall design is reminiscent of classical European architectural styles, with decorative and symbolic elements.
description: A small, ornate stone kiosk with a domed roof, decorative finials, and a prominent crest on the front, set on a cobblestone base. The structure is solid, historical, and ceremonial in appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main crest with a crown and shield, flanked by decorative finials and the domed roof with a central lantern.
description_view_1: This side view displays a blank plaque and the same domed roof, with no signage or windows visible.
description_view_2: The rear view features two diamond-shaped plaques and the same architectural details as other sides.
description_view_3: This side view shows a single, faded rectangular plaque and the cobblestone base, with no additional signage.
attribute_signage_type: Printed crest and shield on the front, engraved plaques on rear and side panels; all signage is integrated into the stone structure.
attribute_roof_design: Domed roof with four decorative finials at corners and a central lantern ornament; appears to be made of dark stone or metal.
attribute_architectural_style: Traditional European with classical and ceremonial influences, featuring ornate masonry and decorative elements.
